_note: Maps PDF basenames (in data/cfpb-cache/) to filing metadata. Used by extract.ts to detect family-filings and refuse per-card extraction. Family PDFs do NOT contain per-card Schumer Box values — they show ranges across the whole card family — so extracting from them produces wrong data (the 2026-04-25 incident on amex-platinum was caused by a different bug, but the same pattern would corrupt boa-* cards if we let it run).

_extraction_strategies.single-card: Run extract.ts normally. LLM extracts per-card Schumer Box.
_extraction_strategies.refuse-per-card-use-plan-b: Family filing — values are ranges across multiple cards, not per-card. extract.ts refuses to write facts. Use Plan B (issuer disclosure page scraper) for per-card values. See docs/plan-b-disclosure-pages.md.
_extraction_strategies.needs-review: Classifier flagged or operator suspects family-style. Manually inspect before adding to single-card or family list.

boa-platinum.pdf.family_range_summary: AF $0-$550, FX 0-3%, APR Prime+9.74% to Prime+21.74%, late_fee up to $40, BT 0-5%, cash advance 5%
boa-platinum.pdf.covers_note: Inferred from data/cards/ prefix matching. PDF is the standard BoA consumer credit card agreement; actual coverage may vary. Verify each card via Plan B disclosure URL before promoting.
boa-platinum.pdf.audit_signal: family marker 'depending on which card' + pct range

boa-platinum-signature.pdf.covers_note: Manually inspect to determine which BoA Visa Signature cards this covers (likely premium-rewards / travel-rewards Signature variants).
boa-platinum-signature.pdf.audit_signal: family marker 'depending on which card' + pct range

boa-secured.pdf.covers_note: Likely also covers any BoA secured products not currently in OpenCard.
boa-secured.pdf.audit_signal: family marker 'depending on which card' + pct range

capital-one-quicksilver.pdf.family_range_summary: AF $0-$39, APR 25.74% to 29.74%, late_fee up to $40, cash advance $10 or 3%
capital-one-quicksilver.pdf.covers_note: Capital One files one consumer agreement covering Quicksilver/SavorOne/VentureOne family. Per-card AF/APR varies — must use issuer disclosure pages for canonical values.
capital-one-quicksilver.pdf.audit_signal: family marker 'shows a range of terms' + fee range

capital-one-secure.pdf.covers_note: Verify which Capital One secured products are covered.
capital-one-secure.pdf.audit_signal: family marker 'shows a range of terms' + pct range

capital-one-venture-x.pdf.covers_note: Likely Venture / Venture X / Venture X Business family.
capital-one-venture-x.pdf.audit_signal: family marker 'shows a range of terms' + fee range

navy-federal.pdf.family_range_summary: 7+ Navy Federal cards in one Pricing Terms doc with per-card APRs (Platinum 10.99-18.00%, GO REWARDS 14.24-18.00%, cashRewards 14.90-18.00%, cashRewards Plus 14.90-18.00%, More Rewards Amex 14.90-18.00%, Flagship Rewards 15.49-18.00%, cashRewards Secured 18.00%)
navy-federal.pdf.covers_note: Manually identified — auto-classifier missed because no fee-range present (only pct ranges per card). NFCU lists each card explicitly.
navy-federal.pdf.audit_signal: manual: 5 distinct card APRs in Pricing Terms section

penfed.pdf.family_range_summary: PenFed Power Cash Visa, PenFed Platinum Rewards Visa Signature, PenFed Pathfinder Rewards Visa Signature in one filing. AF: $0 baseline, $95 for Pathfinder.
penfed.pdf.covers_note: Manually identified — auto-classifier missed because regex saw $1000-$2000 (credit limit) not a fee range.
penfed.pdf.audit_signal: manual: 3 PenFed cards listed with own AF tiers

needs_review._note: PDFs that may be family-style but classifier wasn't confident. Manually inspect when adding new cards or running Stage 3 batch.
needs_review.barclays-gap.pdf: Barclays retail co-brand — likely covers Gap/Banana Republic/Old Navy/Athleta (4 brands, possibly 1 PDF).
needs_review.barclays-ubereats.pdf: Has multiple pct ranges but classifier marked false-positive earlier. Likely single-card with credit-tiered APR. Verify.
needs_review.sync-amazon.pdf: Synchrony retail — Amazon Store Card vs Amazon Prime Visa might be in same filing.
needs_review.pnc-cash-unlimited.pdf: PNC consumer card filing — possibly covers Cash Unlimited / Cash Rewards / Premier Traveler.
needs_review.usb-amex-card.pdf: U.S. Bank — possibly covers Altitude family.
needs_review.usb-flex-rewards.pdf: U.S. Bank — possibly covers Flex Perks / Cash Plus.

_chase_parse_errors_note: 50 chase numbered PDFs (chase-271318.pdf etc.) fail pdf-parse with 'Invalid PDF structure'. These are likely XFA forms or PDF v2.0. Tracked separately. Use named chase PDFs (chase-sapphire-preferred.pdf etc.) which parse fine.
